title: 10 best herbal teas for pertussis
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, teas helps with pertussis because of its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. The herb's active compounds, such as rosmarinic acid and carnosic acid, have been shown to inhibit the growth of bacteria and viruses that cause pertussis, also known as whooping cough. Additionally, sage teas have a soothing effect on the respiratory system, helping to relieve coughing and congestion, making it a potential natural remedy to help alleviate symptoms...
